title: 0D.7: Home Assistant token guide
description: Write docs/guides/ha-token-setup.md: create long-lived access token, verify with curl. Token to .env. GitHub Issue #93.

title: 0D.6: Verify OAuth flows end-to-end
description: Human + Agent: Python test script to fetch Google events, fetch Microsoft events. Confirms creds work. GitHub Issue #92.

title: 0D.5: Create .env.example template
description: All required variables, no values. Committed to repo. .env gitignored. GitHub Issue #91.

title: 0C.6: Build firmware artifact
description: On push to main: PlatformIO build, upload .bin as release artifact. GitHub Issue #81.

title: 0D.4: Microsoft OAuth walkthrough
description: Interactive: Walk through guide with user. Capture tenant ID, client ID, permissions. Secrets to .env. GitHub Issue #90.

title: 0D.3: Microsoft Azure Entra setup guide
description: Write docs/guides/microsoft-oauth-setup.md: register app, Graph API Calendar perms, OAuth2 flow, client secret, refresh token. GitHub Issue #89.

title: 0C.5: Deploy bridge to Pi 5
description: On push to main: Docker build, SCP, docker compose up. Health check /api/health. GitHub Issue #80.

title: 0B.7: GitHub Beads reconciliation workflow
description: GitHub Action on cron: sync board labels with Beads status. Stale warnings for 7+ days in-progress. REST API only for issues. GitHub Issue #75.

title: 0D.2: Google OAuth walkthrough
description: Interactive: Walk through guide with user. Capture project ID, client ID, redirect URI back to guide. Secrets to .env. GitHub Issue #88.

title: 0C.3: CI bridge build and test
description: On PR: Python lint (ruff), type check (mypy), pytest. Fail if tests break. GitHub Issue #78.

title: 0B.6: Update preflight for Pi 5 tunnel
description: Preflight checks port 3310 (not 3307). Update start-claude.ps1. Fallback cascade: 3310, 3311, 3312. GitHub Issue #74.

title: 0D.1: Google Cloud Console setup guide
description: Write docs/guides/google-oauth-setup.md: create project, enable Calendar API, OAuth consent screen, credentials, refresh token. GitHub Issue #87.

title: 0C.2: CI firmware build
description: On PR: PlatformIO compile check. Fail if build breaks. GitHub Issue #77.

title: 0B.5: Add dependency chains
description: Block dev epics on 0B. Add depends-on in GitHub Issues. Set Beads dependencies. GitHub Issue #73.

title: 0B.4: Verify workflow tollgating
description: Test full lifecycle. Confirm agents cannot pull backlog items. Confirm testing items do not auto-close. GitHub Issue #72.

title: 0C.1: Replace Project board with flat layout
description: Delete Iteration board, recreate with STATUS + PRIORITY fields. Re-add all issues. Map field IDs for automation. GitHub Issue #76.

title: 0B.3: Move all dev tasks to backlog
description: All 49 feature stories to todo (Beads backlog). Only infra tasks remain in open. GitHub Issue #71.

title: 0A.5: Docker network for bridge + Dolt
description: Shared Docker network so bridge container reaches Dolt directly. docker-compose.yml for full Pi 5 stack. GitHub Issue #68.

title: 0A.4: Router port forwarding
description: Human-guided: Forward custom SSH port + bridge API port (8080) through ASUS RT-AX82U router to Pi 5. Provide guide doc. GitHub Issue #67.

title: 0B.2: Migrate 49 tasks to Dolt
description: Move from local backend to Pi 5 Dolt. Verify bd ready shows same tasks. GitHub Issue #70.

title: 0A.3: SSH tunnel Windows to Pi 5 Dolt
description: Tunnel script: ssh -fNL 3310:127.0.0.1:3306 strycher@192.168.50.24. Port 3310 (avoids 3307-3309 Hetzner range). Update start-claude.ps1 and preflight.sh. GitHub Issue #66.
close_reason: SSH tunnel verified: ssh -fNL 3310:127.0.0.1:3306 strycher@192.168.50.24. Python pymysql connection successful through tunnel.

title: 0B.1: Configure Beads to Pi 5 Dolt
description: Update .beads/metadata.json: host=127.0.0.1, port=3310, db=beads_DCC. Verify bd list works. GitHub Issue #69.

title: 0A.2: Create beads_DCC database
description: Initialize Dolt database on Pi 5, create Beads tables, verify connectivity from Pi 5 localhost. GitHub Issue #65.
close_reason: beads_DCC database created on Pi 5 Dolt, root@% user configured, verified connectivity from Windows via tunnel

title: 0A.1: Install Dolt on Pi 5
description: Docker container with persistent volume. Port 3306 internal, exposed on Pi 5 network. GitHub Issue #64.
close_reason: Dolt 1.83.2 running in Docker on Pi 5, port 3306 exposed, persistent volume, verified connectivity

title: 6.4 Tasks summary card (GH #34)
description: Top 3-5 tasks by priority/due. Title + due date. Source indicator (Unfocused vs Monday.com). Priority badge. Tap navigates to Tasks screen. Empty state.

title: 6.3 Weather summary card (GH #30)
description: Weather icon, current temp (large), high/low. Rounded card. Handles missing data with stale indicator. Default location: Liberty Twp, OH.

title: 9.3 Dashboard endpoint — GET /api/dashboard (GH #49)
description: Merge all cached adapter data into single JSON. generated_at timestamp. Per-source: status, last_updated, data. Missing sources return null with error metadata. Fast (reads cache only).

title: 6.2 Next appointment card (GH #29)
description: Rounded card with shadow. Event title + time range. Color-coded left border per calendar source. +N more today count. Empty state. Handles both Google and Microsoft data.

title: 9.2 Adapter framework — base class + scheduler (GH #47)
description: Abstract base adapter: poll(), parse(). Async scheduler per adapter. In-memory TTL cache. Error isolation (one failing adapter doesn't affect others). Retry with exponential backoff. Per-adapter status: ok/error/stale.

title: 6.1 Clock + date widget (GH #27)
description: Large clock (32px font) + date. 12h/24h format from config. Timezone-aware (POSIX TZ from NVS). Updates every second. Graceful display when NTP not synced.

title: 9.1 Bridge scaffolding — FastAPI + Docker (GH #43)
description: FastAPI app + uvicorn. Dockerfile + docker-compose.yml. config.yaml with defaults. .env template. GET /api/health endpoint. Python 3.11+. bridge/ directory at project root.

title: 2.3 NTP time sync + RTC + POSIX timezone (GH #19)
description: NTP from pool.ntp.org, first action after WiFi connects, re-sync every 6h. RTC BM8563 at I2C 0x51 holds time across reboots. POSIX TZ string from NVS. Boot shows Syncing time until first success. API: getLocalTime, isSynced, getTimezone.

title: 5.2 JSON parser — ArduinoJson DashboardData (GH #28)
description: DashboardData struct matching bridge schema. Per-source data structs. ArduinoJson deserialization with error handling. Partial data (null sources). Per-source status + last_updated. PSRAM for large docs.

title: 2.2 WiFi manager — multi-SSID (GH #16)
description: Multi-SSID WiFi: store 5 networks in NVS, auto-connect by priority, reconnect with exponential backoff. Expose RSSI for status bar. Events: connected/disconnected/connecting. API: addNetwork, removeNetwork, getStatus, getRSSI.

title: 2.1 NVS config store (GH #14)
description: NVS-based config: settings struct (WiFi creds, bridge URL, timezone, brightness), first-boot defaults, load/save, factory reset. Defaults: bridge=genx2k.dynu.net, tz=EST5EDT,M3.2.0,M11.1.0

title: 5.1 HTTP client — async bridge polling (GH #26)
description: Non-blocking HTTP GET to configurable bridge URL. Configurable poll interval (default 30s). HTTPS support. Timeout and retry. Callbacks for success/failure. Must not block LVGL loop.

title: 4.3 Status bar — time, WiFi, sync (GH #25)
description: 30px top bar, persistent. Left: time (12h/24h). Center: date. Right: WiFi signal icon + sync indicator (green/yellow/red). Tap sync icon opens per-source detail overlay. Real-time updates.

title: 1.5 Boot splash screen (GH #17)
description: Show boot splash immediately after display init. Project logo centered, Connecting status with animated indicator. Status updates as init progresses. Smooth transition to home screen. Uses LVGL widgets, pre-allocated.

title: 4.2 Nav bar — 5-icon bottom bar (GH #24)
description: 50px bottom bar, persistent. 5 icons: Home/Calendar/Tasks/Weather/More at 160px each. Active highlight. More opens submenu: DevOps, Claude, HA, Settings, Diagnostics. Icon-driven, not text.

title: 1.4 Backlight control — STC8H1K28 I2C (GH #15)
description: Control backlight via STC8H1K28 at I2C 0x30. Range 0x05 (off) to 0x10 (max). Shared I2C bus with touch. API: setBrightness(uint8_t).

title: 4.1 Screen manager — create-once lifecycle (GH #23)
description: Base screen class: create(), update(data), show(), hide(). All screens pre-allocated at boot, never destroyed. LVGL transition animations. screenManager.updateAll(data) pushes to all. No dynamic widget allocation after startup.

title: 1.3 Touch driver init — GT911 I2C (GH #13)
description: Initialize GT911 capacitive touch at I2C 0x5D (SDA=15, SCL=16). Reset via TCA9534 IO expander at 0x18 pin 2: LOW 20ms then HIGH 100ms. Register as LVGL indev pointer type. Test: touch coords logged, LVGL button responds.

title: 1.2 Display driver init — ST7262 RGB + LVGL (GH #12)
description: Initialize ST7262 RGB display with LVGL double-buffered rendering in PSRAM. Pins: R(7,17,18,3,46) G(9,10,11,12,13,14) B(21,47,48,45,38) DE=42 VS=41 HS=40 PCLK=39 at 21MHz. Test: solid color fill and LVGL label render.

title: 1.1 PlatformIO project init (GH #11)
description: Initialize PlatformIO project with ESP32-S3 board config, partition table, PSRAM enabled, Arduino framework. Libraries: LVGL 8.3.11, LovyanGFX 1.1.16, ArduinoJson. Must compile clean with empty setup/loop.

title: 0C.11: Version bump
description: On merge to main: bump semantic version tag. GitHub Issue #86.

title: 0C.9: Sync labels to Project board
description: On label event: map board:* + priority:* to Project V2 fields. GraphQL (minimal). GitHub Issue #84.

title: 0C.8: Reconcile Beads and GitHub
description: Cron: sync board labels with Beads status. Stale warnings. REST API. GitHub Issue #83.

title: 0C.7: Auto-promote dependencies
description: On issue closed + cron: promote board:todo to board:ready when deps resolved. REST API. GitHub Issue #82.

title: 0C.4: Auto-merge approved PRs
description: On CI pass: squash-merge approved PRs. Uses PROJECT_PAT. GitHub Issue #79.

title: 10.8 Beads/Dolt tasks adapter (GH #58)
description: Connect via SSH tunnel (ports 3307-3309). Query open/in_progress tasks across configured projects. Title, status, assignee, project. Handle tunnel unavailable.

title: 10.7 Monday.com tasks adapter (GH #57)
description: API token auth. Fetch items from configured boards. Title, due date, status, board name. Handle API errors.

title: 10.6 Unfocused tasks adapter (GH #56)
description: Query Supabase with service-role key. Open tasks: title, due, priority. Sort by priority/due. Handle unavailable. Future: migrate to Unfocused API endpoint.

title: 10.5 GitHub adapter (GH #55)
description: Personal access token. Configurable repo list. Per repo: open PRs, issues, CI/Actions status. REST API only (not GraphQL). Default repos: Unfocused, Field Compass, DCC.

title: 10.4 Weather adapter (GH #54)
description: Primary: HA weather entity. Fallback: OpenWeatherMap API. Current conditions + hourly forecast (6-12h) + high/low. Default: Liberty Twp OH (39.3451, -84.3916).

title: 10.3 Home Assistant adapter (GH #53)
description: Long-lived access token auth. Fetch states for configured entities. Types: climate, light, lock, cover, sensor. Group by category. Handle HA unavailable.

title: 8.4 Display settings (GH #38)
description: Brightness slider (0x05-0x10 via STC8H1K28). Auto-dim schedule. Clock format 12h/24h toggle. Live preview. Save to NVS.

title: 10.2 Microsoft 365 Calendar adapter (GH #52)
description: Graph API OAuth2. Fetch today/tomorrow events via /me/calendar/calendarView. Title, time, location, category color. Multiple calendars. MSAL or manual token flow.

title: 8.3 Timezone picker (GH #37)
description: US presets: Eastern/Central/Mountain/Pacific/Arizona. Manual POSIX entry. Preview time in selected zone. Save to NVS, apply immediately. Default: EST5EDT.

title: 10.1 Google Calendar adapter (GH #51)
description: OAuth2 with refresh token. Fetch today/tomorrow events. Title, start/end, location, color. Multiple calendars. Token refresh on expiry. Color from API or config.yaml.

title: 8.2 Bridge URL config (GH #35)
description: Current URL display. Edit via on-screen KB. Test connection (GET /api/health). Show result + response time. Save to NVS. Default: genx2k.dynu.net.

title: 9.4 Config endpoint — GET/PUT /api/config (GH #50)
description: GET returns current config (no secrets). PUT accepts partial updates. Validate before applying. Update refresh intervals at runtime.

title: 8.1 WiFi settings screen (GH #32)
description: List saved networks with signal strength. Add new via on-screen KB. Delete with confirm. Tap to connect/disconnect. Up to 5 saved. Priority ordering.

title: 7.5 Home Assistant screen (GH #45)
description: Entity group cards: Climate (temps, thermostat), Lights (on/off), Security (locks/doors), Energy (usage, solar). Groups from bridge config.yaml. Add/remove without reflash.

title: 3.1 LVGL on-screen keyboard (GH #18)
description: QWERTY on-screen KB optimized for 800px (10 keys = 80px each). Symbols/numbers mode. Appears on text input focus, disappears on Enter/blur. Used for WiFi passwords, bridge URL, timezone.

title: 5.4 Error state manager (GH #33)
description: Connection states: connected/connecting/disconnected/offline. Partial data mode. Offline mode with cached last-known data. Error overlay when bridge unreachable. Local clock in offline. Auto-recovery.

title: 7.4 DevOps screen — repos + agents (GH #42)
description: Repo cards (scrollable): open PRs, issues, CI status. Active Beads agent + current task. Repo tabs for filter. Configurable repo list from bridge. Default: Unfocused, Field Compass, DCC.

title: 2.4 SD card init (GH #21)
description: Mount SD card (SPI, dip S1=1 S0=0, GPIO 4,5,6). Detect presence gracefully. Basic read/write, log rotation, config backup. Speaker disabled in this mode.

title: 7.3 Weather screen — detail + hourly (GH #41)
description: Current: large icon, temp, description. Details: humidity, wind, precip, high/low. Hourly: horizontal scrollable tiles (6-12h). Location configurable, default Liberty Twp OH. HA or OWM source.

title: 5.3 Staleness tracker (GH #31)
description: Per-source last_updated tracking. Configurable staleness thresholds. States: fresh/aging/stale. API: getSourceStatus(source). Feeds status bar sync indicator and per-screen stale indicators.

title: 7.2 Tasks screen — Unfocused + Monday.com (GH #39)
description: Source tabs: Unfocused and Monday.com (both shown, tap to filter). Title, due date, priority. Read-only v1. NOT Beads — dev tasks on DevOps screen. Empty state per source.

title: 7.1 Calendar screen (GH #36)
description: Day navigation with Prev/Next/Today. Scrollable event cards. Time, title, location. Color-coded left border per source. Current/next event highlighted. Legend at bottom.

title: 0C.10: Branch cleanup
description: Weekly: delete stale branches (7+ days, no PR, not merged). GitHub Issue #85.

title: 10.9 Claude status adapter (GH #59)
description: Query Agent Mail for registered agents + recent activity. Per agent: name, last active, current task. Fallback: local process check. Handle Agent Mail unavailable. Status: active/idle/offline.

title: 8.7 Diagnostics screen (GH #46)
description: FW version, free heap/PSRAM, WiFi RSSI/IP/uptime, per-source sync time + status, last API response time. Auto-refresh.

title: 8.6 Data source toggles (GH #44)
description: Enable/disable per source. Refresh interval slider. Disabled sources hidden on screens. Save to NVS and bridge PUT /api/config. Show current interval and status.

title: 8.5 BLE settings (GH #40)
description: Show paired BLE keyboard. Scan and pair new. Unpair/forget. Phone config service toggle. BLE status indicator.

title: 3.3 BLE phone config service (GH #22)
description: BLE GATT service: characteristics for WiFi SSID/password, bridge URL, timezone. Write saves to NVS. Read returns current config. For cold-start setup before WiFi available. Web BLE or native companion app.

title: 3.2 BLE HID keyboard host (GH #20)
description: ESP32-S3 BLE HID host: scan, pair, receive keystrokes, route to focused LVGL input. Persist pairing across reboots. Standard BT keyboards. Must coexist with BLE phone config.

title: 7.6 Claude activity screen (GH #48)
description: Agent session status (active/idle). Last message time from Agent Mail. Current task description. Reads from bridge adapter, no direct PC process access. Clean empty state.
